metadata.task: Determine which incline has higher friction based on how the blocks slide.
metadata.description: Work from the Friction Comparison on Inclines scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM lets the blocks slide and observes that the one on the rough incline slides slower or stops sooner.
reasoning: Higher friction slows down the block more, so the slower block was on the rougher incline, which is object 1.
